CVE-2023-26136.title: Versions of the package tough-cookie before 4.1.3 are vulnerable  ...
CVE-2023-26136.description: Versions of the package tough-cookie before 4.1.3 are vulnerable to Prototype Pollution due to improper handling of Cookies when using CookieJar in rejectPublicSuffixes=false mode. This issue arises from the manner in which the objects are initialized.
